title: Integration with Aha! Roadmap
excerpt: We would love to be able to integrate features/user stories directly from Aha! Roadmap. Currently having to export an xls Aha Report and import it into Monday twice a week just to keep our features in sync.

posts.author: caloah (Shannon Fry)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to be able to integrate features/user stories directly from Aha! Roadmap. Currently having to export an xls Aha Report and import it into Monday twice a week just to keep our features in sync.
